name: Essence of the Body → Exalt fill (Body Armour)
description: Guarantee a Life prefix on a body armour, then exalt for resistances and defensive stats.

steps.verb: Use Lesser Essence of the Body on a normal body armour (ilvl 60+)
steps.outcome: Upgrades to magic with a guaranteed +Life prefix and one random other mod.
Upgrades to rare; adds a third random mod.
Adds random mods one at a time. Aim for at least 2 resistance rolls before stopping. If you hit a useless prefix early, consider annulling and trying again.

notes_for_user: Solid baseline body armour. The Life prefix is your floor — even if Exalt fills are bad, the result is wearable. For a tankier build, use a strength-base armour (e.g. Plate Vest) so the Life prefix tiers higher.
